penalties.description: Task was not completed - no suture cutting or final completion visible in the frames provided.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reports incomplete task with only instructional slides and initial setup visible, while GPT reports full completion with 153s timing. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was even completed, and Claude's specific observation of only instructional content, the conservative assessment of incomplete task is adopted.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that only instructional slides and setup were visible takes precedence over GPT's completion timing when there is fundamental disagreement about task completion status.

claude_value.description: Task was not completed - no suture cutting or final completion visible in the frames provided.

gpt_value.description: The knot slipped slightly during the task.

disagreements.rationale: If the task was not completed as Claude observed, then knot slippage penalties are not applicable. The incomplete task assessment is more fundamental.
Consistent with the incomplete task assessment, only the initial phases that Claude could observe should be included.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of timing or other penalties.
